title: Senior Software Engineer - CGI India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - CGI India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CGI India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About CGI India:
CGI India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India!
